race.comment: TURNING CIRCLE (9) has impressed in two runs back and gets every chance to run the trip with the 3kg claim from the soft gate. Stalked the speed second-up with a well deserved Maiden win over 1350m at Wyong. Serious contender well graded here. SUGARFIRE (10) win record hardly excites and strips fitter third-up. Kept finding through the line to secure third over 1450m at this track. Best figures measure up nicely. Makes plenty of appeal. VILLA CASTINA (3) Maurice filly expected to go on with it this time in. Indicated a win was imminent with a tough third over 1600m at Gosford in C1 grade. Claim helps and has genuine each way prospects. ALL KIRKED UP (8) chipped away late on resumption to run sixth over 1450m at this track. Has further upside with winning apprentice going back aboard.
